name: magus-console
description: The magus native console: a standalone, decoupled tabbed + tiling PWA that hosts the log viewer, graph explorer, dashboard, and activity trail as live lenses on the daemon over loopback. Built independently of the docs site (no scribe templating); its output is slipped into the reserved /console/ path. Managed with pnpm (pinned in mise.toml), .npmrc's minimum-release-age is the supply-chain guard.

scripts.build: pnpm run build-js && pnpm run build-css && pnpm run copy-static
scripts.build-js: esbuild src/console/main.ts --bundle --minify --format=esm --outfile=gen/console.js && esbuild src/console/logs/main.ts --bundle --minify --format=esm --outfile=gen/logs/log-viewer.js && esbuild src/console/graph/main.ts --bundle --minify --format=esm --outfile=gen/graph/explorer.js && esbuild src/console/dashboard/main.ts --bundle --minify --format=esm --outfile=gen/dashboard/dashboard.js && esbuild src/console/activity/main.ts --bundle --minify --format=esm --outfile=gen/activity/activity.js && esbuild src/theme.ts --minify --outfile=gen/theme.js
scripts.build-css: esbuild src/styles/patternfly.css --bundle --minify --external:'*.woff2' --external:'*.woff' --external:'*.ttf' --external:'*.svg' --external:'*.png' --external:'*.jpg' --external:'*.gif' --outfile=gen/patternfly.css && esbuild src/styles/tokens.css --minify --outfile=gen/tokens.css && esbuild src/styles/overrides.css --minify --outfile=gen/overrides.css && esbuild src/styles/console.css --minify --outfile=gen/console.css && esbuild src/console/logs/logs.css --minify --outfile=gen/logs/logs.css && esbuild src/console/graph/graph.css --minify --outfile=gen/graph/graph.css && esbuild src/console/dashboard/dashboard.css --minify --outfile=gen/dashboard/dashboard.css && esbuild src/console/settings/settings.css --minify --outfile=gen/settings/settings.css
scripts.copy-static: mkdir -p gen/assets gen/logs gen/graph gen/dashboard gen/activity && cp index.html manifest.webmanifest sw.js gen/ && cp src/assets/* gen/assets/ && cp src/console/logs/scaffold.html gen/logs/ && cp src/console/graph/scaffold.html gen/graph/ && cp src/console/dashboard/scaffold.html gen/dashboard/ && cp ../docs/graph.json gen/graph/graph.json && node scripts/surface-stubs.mjs
